expected_effect: Reduce quote-motion spikes while keeping tail protection more selective than a broad flattening pass.
expected_failure_signature: If jumps remain noisy or the filter over-smooths into tail_protection_loss, the new state semantics are not buying useful control.
expected_win_condition: Smooth protective behavior without flattening the defensive floor into an arb leak.
hidden_coupling_removed: Instantaneous shocks currently drive both volatility estimation and release timing.
rationale: Replace instantaneous event-spike interpretation with a filtered cluster-persistence state that only elevates protection after repeated aligned stress, then releases with memory.
title: Filtered cluster-persistence state
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes state semantics and memory persistence while keeping quote assembly fixed.
